title: Copper Bulb Early
body:
Copper bulb transplanted from 1.21

Made version 1.20.1 use the most common copper bulb

Doesn't auto-oxidize You can make it with oxidized blocks

The composition table is the same as the new version!

![In Crafting Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05bfaa748cd938b7aecc5240e15c7a548bef7632.png)
![Bulb Img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ccb5683ea1b4560d8d26789d220660a4fa7941f_0.webp)
